ArgonTest.Name: Swap tuple twice
ArgonTest.InputSource:
import Ar._
proc printTuple(a: String, b: String): () do puts a puts b end
def swapTuple(a: String, b: String): (String, String) = b, a
proc main(): () do val tupleValue: (String, String) = ''1'', ''2'' printTuple (swapTuple (swapTuple tupleValue)) end
